target: 16. Evidence Video
July 23
(Now, about my phone from yesterday...)
Damn it... It's perfectly <color=#GF_KEY_MI2_DOUGA>recorded</color>...!
(Since I managed to record it, I can't just ignore it.)
(First and foremost, I need to warn Mio about the danger…)
Mio, can I talk to you for a second?
Yeah, what's up?
There's a video I want you to see.
Huh? What? What kind of video?
It's one I took last night…

Oh really?
What's in it?
Eh... what is this...
She appeared in front of our house last night, just before 9 PM.
After that, she stared up at the second floor for five minutes, then walked off and disappeared toward the mountains...
Who... is this...!? M... me!!?

No.
You were taking a bath at that time.
…Yeah.
They call that kind of thing... a Shadow, right?
Hey... You know about the Shadow Sickness, right?
Mio... that thing came to kill. To kill you...
M... me... Came to kill... me...
Try zooming in... here. At her hand...
No... way... She's holding a kitchen knife...
The Shadow Sickness... It isn't... a superstition... I knew it...!!
Ushio... saw one too, right? Three days before she died... a Shadow!
I see, Shin-chan... You heard about the Shadows from my sister, didn't you...?
Yeah...
(Actually, I heard it from you…)
...And, I ended up seeing it too. Your Shadow, yesterday... yeah...
Hey... Shin-chan.
My sister... might have been killed. By a Shadow...!!
Honestly... I think it sounds ridiculous. But once you actually see it...
I actually... saw a Shadow... copy a person.
Eh!? Copy...?
Yeah. It was copying them...
Just like a camera, with a flash...
(...? A flash... went off...?)
Hey!! Who was that just now. You can't take photos here!!
(...A flash...? Why in a place like this--)

That's right!!
It flashed during the funeral too!
Huh?
No one had a camera back then. Which means...!
(Damn it... That flash of light was a Shadow that sneaked into the funeral copying someone...!)
Wait, Shin-chan. What do you mean it flashed during the funeral?
...Huh? You don't remember?
You know... after we put the flowers in Ushio's coffin! There was a flash...! It caused a bit of a commotion, right?
Y-you don't know!?
U-uh… yeah…
(No… wait!?)
(That commotion happened twice. During the first funeral, and the one last loop...)
(But this time... it didn't happen! There was no flash!)
(That means the Shadow at the funeral didn't copy anyone this time!)
...Hey, Shin-chan.
(Why!? The Shadow copied someone both times before... But this time it didn't do it.)
Shin-chan!
(Did I do something different from before!?)
Shin-chan!!
Save the thinking for later. We have to tell Shiori-chan about the Shadows!
That the Shadow coming to kill the real person isn't a superstition, and that Shiori-chan is in danger too!!
(That's right... Kobayakawa Shiori-chan also said she saw her own Shadow.)
(Shiori-chan might be targeted too. It's definitely dangerous.)
(That's exactly why I can't let Mio get anywhere near that danger...!!)
Let's go right now! To Shiori-chan's house!
Yeah…
…but I'll go alone.
Huh? Why!?
Mio, stay here and wait. ...Please.
(...I forcefully persuaded Mio to stay, and headed to Koba Mart by myself.)
(I understand how Mio feels painfully well. With what happened to Ushio, she probably can't just sit still.)
(But the Shadows are dangerous. I can't take Mio, who is being targeted by one, with me.)
(Of course, I'm also anxious about leaving Mio's side...)
(Considering they sneak around disguised as people, the chances of them attacking somewhere with a lot of eyes around should be low.)
(It's much safer for her to stay at Kofune, where lots of customers come and go, than to act together with me.)
...I just hope Shiori-chan is safe.
Listen, okay? Shiori-chan. Make sure you stay with your mom and dad at all times.
Even if there's a girl who looks exactly like you, you absolutely must not get close to her...
(I already warned Shiori-chan about the danger at the funeral home, but...)
(Please... be safe...)
